payload.label: window
payload.long_description: Large dark rectangular reflective window showing a dim interior reflection of a staircase, table lamp, and furniture; glass appears slightly blurred or smudged and the crop is edge-cut so the frame is partially visible — approximate distance ~2.0 m from camera.

message.content: {"label":"window","short_description":"dark reflective window, edge-cropped","long_description":"Large dark rectangular reflective window showing a dim interior reflection of a staircase, table lamp, and furniture; glass appears slightly blurred or smudged and the crop is edge-cut so the frame is partially visible — approximate distance ~2.0 m from camera.","attributes":["dark glass","reflective surface","rectangular shape","interior reflection: staircase","interior reflection: lamp","interior reflection: furniture","blurred/low-light","edge-cropped/partial","slight glare","smudged/mottled surface"],"distance_from_camera_m":2.0}
